hero.title: Less noise, more clarity.
hero.subtitle: Turn the chaos in your mind into focused flow — one thought at a time.
value.dump.title: Dump it all out
value.dump.description: Rumination, mental load, overthinking — get it out of your head.
value.get.title: Get what matters
value.get.description: Clear action steps, a list of priorities, and scheduled work and breaks.
features.sort.title: Smart Sorting
features.sort.description: Drag and drop your thoughts into categories that actually make sense to you.
features.focus.title: Focus Mode
features.focus.description: Block out the noise. Work on one thought bucket at a time.
features.reflect.title: Daily Reflection
features.reflect.description: End each day with a clear head. Review what you sorted and what still needs attention.
features.personas.title: Your kind of support
features.personas.description: Choose how Mindsorter shows up for you — as a Friend, a Mentor, or a Manager.
features.celebrations.title: Milestone Celebrations
features.celebrations.description: Hit a goal? Mindsorter notices. Small wins deserve a dopamine boost.
